task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Mobile Banking App' project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenProject interface displays 'Mobile Banking App' in the header, sidebar, or breadcrumbs, indicating the agent is inside the correct project.

task_completion.description: Locate the project status or health section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The project overview page is visible, specifically showing the 'Project status' widget or section.

task_completion.description: Open the project status edit form or modal.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form, modal, or inline editing interface for updating the project status is actively displayed on the screen.

task_completion.description: Set the project status to 'At risk'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The status dropdown, radio button, or selection indicator clearly shows 'At risk' as the chosen option.

task_completion.description: Enter the required explanation text for the status update.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text area for the status description/explanation contains the text: 'Critical security vulnerability found in biometric auth module (CVE-2024-9999). Release candidate 1.0 blocked pending patch.'

task_completion.description: Save the status update so it reflects on the project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message is shown, or the project overview page now displays the updated 'At risk' status along with the entered explanation text.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OpenProject web interface rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the OpenProject GUI, not a terminal window executing cURL or script commands.

integrity.description: The agent entered the text into the actual OpenProject application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The explanation text is typed into the OpenProject status description field, not a separate text editor like Notepad or gedit.

integrity.description: The agent actually submitted the form rather than just filling it out.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshots show the saved state on the dashboard or a confirmation toast, rather than ending on an unsaved form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project Name: 'Mobile Banking App' (Identifier: mobile-banking-app). Target Status: 'At risk'. Required Explanation Text: 'Critical security vulnerability found in biometric auth module (CVE-2024-9999). Release candidate 1.0 blocked pending patch.' The explanation must contain the keywords: security, vulnerability, biometric, and CVE-2024-9999.
